title: Employment Practices: At-Will Employment
description: Conroe ISD employees, other than those with a formal contract, work on an at-will basis, meaning the district or the employee can end the employment relationship at any time. Understanding this arrangement helps community members know how staffing decisions can be made and why some employees may not have the same job protections as others. It reflects the district's general approach to managing its workforce in a way that allows flexibility in hiring and employment decisions.
